title: Happy 90th Birthday Pop-Up Greeting Card Original Second Nature 3D Pop Up Cards
features: This unique 3D card jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop Up to instantly open when removed from it's envelope
The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side
Gift Tag & small side panel available for a hand written personal message
The Pop Ups can be used for so much more, why not use them as part of a table arrangement to hold a balloon, or as part of a floral arrangement?
description: From the manufacturer Pop Up Cards for Personalized Bouquets Add a personal touch to bouquets for birthdays, thanksgiving, Mother's Day or other occasions with a Suki pop-up card. A miracle of paper art The 3D pop up cards from Suki Gifts are a miracle of paper art. Each card has over 50 folds and cuts and is individually folded and carefully assembled into a unique paper sculpture. An elastic band holds the card together and releases the "pop". The card has a tag for a personal greeting and also a small text box on the back. The card has the dimensions of approx. 17 x 12 cm, when opened, the card unfolds to a size of 17 x 24 cm. Pop Up Cards for Special Occasions The unique pop-up cards come in a variety of different designs and suitable for any occasion: Birthday cards, birth, thank you, Christmas, Valentine's greeting and much more. Pop up cards as balloon weight Foil balloons filled with balloon gas make any festival even more beautiful. Suki's pop up cards are great as a balloon weight. And of course, each balloon greeting will be even more unforgettable with a personal message for which there is space on the pop-up card.
